headline: Is Akamai (AKAM) the Best Edge Computing Stock to Buy Right Now?
summary: Akamai Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ:AKAM) is one of the 10 Best Edge Computing Stocks to Buy Right Now. On April 23, 2026, Oppenheimer raised the price target on Akamai Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ:AKAM) to $130 from $115 and maintained an Outperform rating ahead of quarterly results. The firm expects revenue to come in at the high end […]
